Define the hyper_grid_domain S4 Class

Source: R/class_definitions.R
hyper_grid_domain-class.Rd

Holds the set of hyperparameters (and, once populated by add_hyperparameter(), their tuning-method-specific values) that hyper_tune() – invoked internally by run_sb_backtest() – will search over. This class only validates that hyperparameter names are recognized; it does not check the shape of their values (a numeric vector, a distribution spec, or a bounds pair) – that shape check belongs to tuning_strategy-class and depends on the chosen tuning_method.

Slots

hyperparameter_list

A named list, one entry per hyperparameter, drawn from:

  • glmnet: alpha, lambda.min.ratio

  • rf: mtry, num.trees, max.depth, min.bucket

  • xgb: min_child_weight, max_depth, subsample, colsample_bytree, eta, gamma, nrounds

  • nn: regularizer_l1, regularizer_l2, droprate, lr, size_of_batch, number_of_epochs

Developed by Paulo Guimaraes.

Site built with pkgdown 2.2.1.
